#
# Rule: mobile_phone_number
# Category: telecom
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Alias of `phone_number` — identical input-to-output behaviour,
# including the 00NN international access prefix and compact-form
# support. Exists so callers with mobile-specific schema naming can
# register that name without re-wrapping. Prefer `phone_number` for new
# code; register a distinct custom rule if mobile-specific masking
# matters to your workload. Example: +44 7911 123456 → +44 ****
# **3456; 0044 7911 123456 → 0044 **** **3456.
